section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports no headaches or dizziness.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Absence of headaches or dizziness is a patient-reported symptom history rather than an objective exam or test finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports no chest pain or pressure.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Denial of chest pain or pressure is part of the review of symptoms/history, not an objective physical exam or diagnostic finding.
